export const STRINGS = {
    en: {
        /*TYPE BOX*/
        WriteMessage: "Write a message",
        /*USER MENU*/
        General: "General",
        Account: "Account",
        AccountCreated: "Account created in: ",
        Appearance: "Appearance",
        Help: "Help",
        Profile: "Profile",
        About: "About",
        LogOff: "Log Off",
        Language: "Language",
        Version: "Version",
    },
    pt: {
        /*USER MENU*/
        General: "Geral",
        Account: "Conta",
        AccountCreated: "Conta criada em: ",
        Appearance: "Aparência",
        Help: "Ajuda",
        Profile: "Perfil",
        About: "Sobre",
        LogOff: "Terminar Sessão",
        Language: "Idioma",
        Version: "Versão",
    },
    es: {
        /*USER MENU*/
        General: "General",
        Account: "Cuenta",

        Help: "Ayuda",
        Profile: "Perfil",
        About: "Acerca de",
        LogOff: "Cerrar sesión",

    },
    fr: {

        Appearance: "Apparence",

        Version: "Version",
    }
};
